rationale: Educ. Code §45.301 merely defines terms for the charter school facilities credit enhancement program. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13, so the proposed change does not conflict.
quote:
Sec. 45.301. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "Charter holder" has the meaning assigned by Section 12.1012.
(2) "Program" means the open-enrollment charter school facilities credit enhancement program established under this subchapter.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict detected.
